signals.text: Zero purchases and zero revenue across all 45 days of FERMAT data (Feb 26 - Apr 12). Platform is in pre-launch/onboarding phase with no conversion activity yet.
Very active Slack channel: 20+ messages exchanged between Apr 1-9, with brand contacts (Lindsey Shin, Jiyoon Cha) and Pulkit collaborating on funnel design, PDP styling, and launch readiness.
Weekly sync cadence established: calls on Mar 25, Apr 7, and next scheduled for Apr 14. Brand is engaged and responsive.
Best Seller funnel nearing launch: A/B test set up, 15% discount messaging aligned across full funnel, design feedback nearly complete as of Apr 7 sync.
Brand expressed frustration on Apr 6 about design feedback not being applied to go-live funnels, stating 'We were supposed to go live last Friday.' Launch timeline has slipped multiple times.
Desktop experience flagged by brand on Apr 9: 'the formatting is not optimized for desktop screens.' Needs resolution before full launch.
Pipeline expanding: brand requesting new landing page templates for May product launch with influencer/UGC content, plus product-centric pages for individual products.

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT|| Kick-Off Call
recent.summary: Kick-off call between Pulkit and Lindsey covering onboarding setup, platform walkthrough, funnel building capabilities, branding configuration, and initial project planning for Medik8 FERMAT implementation.

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT || Weekly Sync-up
recent.summary: Final design changes from Jiyoon almost complete. Resolved PDP strategy confusion -- confirmed using FERMAT PDPs for funnels, native PDPs elsewhere. 15% discount messaging now consistent across full funnel. Going live with best seller funnel; A/B test set up vs homepage. Pulkit to create two landing page templates (best-seller + video/UGC) for May launch.

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT || Weekly Sync-up
recent.summary: Brand assets (colors, fonts) uploaded successfully. Domain shop.us.medik8.com configured with DNS pending from Medik8. Facebook integration resolved with limited reporting access pending Lindsey approval. Welcome series landing page requirements defined (Social15 code, best sellers, brand USPs). Fospha analytics integration requested for roadmap (2-3 month timeline).

recent.title: Medik8 x FERMAT | Platform Demo
recent.summary: Platform demo with Mukul for Lindsey and Monika (Head of Digital). Covered funnel builder, landing page matching to ad creative, A/B testing, gift-with-purchase functionality, branding customization, and product recommendations.

recent.title: Catch-up: Medik8 + FERMAT | Follow-up Call
recent.summary: Re-engagement call after previous rep Jack left. Lindsey has internal May deadline to select a provider. Interested in sampling campaign optimization, A/B testing, landing page matching. Evaluating Replo and Shogun as competitors. Needs ROI business case for budget approval.

calls.analysis: Medik8 has had 5 recorded calls across Glyphic and Granola since Feb 9. The account progressed from sales re-engagement (Feb 9 follow-up with Mukul) through platform demo (Feb 19) to kick-off (Mar 9 with Pulkit) and now regular weekly syncs (Mar 25, Apr 7). The cadence has stabilized at weekly touchpoints with Lindsey Shin as the primary contact. Recent calls focused on funnel design finalization, PDP integration, and launch readiness for the Best Seller funnel.

messages.text: Can you confirm that the landing pages are not directing on desktop devices? When I open the link on desktop the formatting is not optimized for desktop screens.
@pulkit
Also, I think we are good to go on design for now. We will revisit design once we start testing + fix the variant buttons on Crystal Retinal and Advanced Pro Collagen Peptides Moisturizer.

On the welcome funnel, I see the 15% badging and discount on the product grid and cart, but when you go to checkout, the discount does not apply. Can you edit so that when customers go to checkout social15 is already applied?
Recap of Apr 7 weekly sync: design updates nearly complete, PDP integration moving forward, 15% badge fixed, A/B test set up, best seller funnel ready to launch.
There are so many things we have to adjust. Please see my feedback here. [Attached: Section 3.png]
Recap of call with Pulkit: 1. Cart Design check 2. Landing Page font/CTA updates 3. Using Fermat PDPs 4. PDP CTA styling 5. Prioritize specific products
Sure! Calling you on Slack huddle.
Can you hop on a call now?
No, we need this one and the PDPs ready.
The changes you mentioned we have implemented in the Meet the Brand: Medik8 V2 funnel. Can get on a quick call today to complete the design.
Feedback from last week has not been applied to go-live funnels. We were supposed to go live last Friday. Can we stay close today?
Following up if page has been updated. CTAs still wrong style. Need larger type. [Attached screenshots]
Thank you so much!
I will get this Funnel updated
Sure Jiyoon
Pulkit, Lindsay and I just aligned and we want this funnel updated in terms of design. Typography and CTAs still off.
Following up. Can we hop on a call today so we can go live tomorrow?
Jiyoon, updated funnel per feedback. Preview link shared for review.
Recap of Mar 31 call: design review completed, Thursday/Friday launch target, typography standards set, CTA simplified to Learn More and Shop Now.

slack.analysis: The Slack channel is highly active with 20+ messages between Apr 1-9 involving Pulkit, Lindsey Shin, and Jiyoon Cha (design contact). The conversation is focused on design finalization for the Welcome/Best Seller funnel launch, with multiple rounds of feedback on typography, CTAs, and PDP styling. Brand contacts are engaged and pushing urgently for launch, with some frustration expressed about delayed design implementations (Apr 6: 'we were supposed to go live last Friday'). A new desktop optimization issue was flagged on Apr 9.

email.analysis: Email activity over the past 30 days is dominated by calendar RSVPs and automated notifications rather than substantive brand correspondence. Lindsey Shin consistently accepts weekly sync invitations (confirming engagement), while Danielle Finn declined the Apr 7 call. Pulkit shared a Loom video of the Medik8 checkout flow that was viewed on Apr 8, indicating active work on the account. Most direct communication appears to happen via Slack rather than email.
